CREATE TABLE big_numbers (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, serialized_number BLOB);
INSERT INTO big_numbers (id, serialized_number) VALUES (1, TO_BASE64(0x1234567890abcdef));
INSERT INTO big_numbers (id, serialized_number) VALUES (2, TO_BASE64(0x0));
INSERT INTO big_numbers (id, serialized_number) VALUES (3, TO_BASE64(0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF));
INSERT INTO big_numbers (id, serialized_number) VALUES (4, TO_BASE64(0x1234567890));
SELECT xenc_bn2dec(serialized_number) FROM big_numbers WHERE id = 1;
SELECT xenc_bn2dec(serialized_number) FROM big_numbers WHERE id = 2;
SELECT xenc_bn2dec(serialized_number) FROM big_numbers WHERE id = 3;
SELECT xenc_bn2dec(serialized_number) FROM (SELECT serialized_number FROM big_numbers WHERE id > 1) AS subquery;
SELECT xenc_bn2dec(serialized_number) FROM big_numbers ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 2;
SELECT xenc_bn2dec(serialized_number) AS decoded_value, id FROM big_numbers WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM big_numbers WHERE id < 3);
SELECT xenc_bn2dec(TO_BASE64(0xFFFFFFFFFFFFFFFF)) AS max_value, xenc_bn2dec(TO_BASE64(0x0)) AS min_value;
CREATE TABLE additional_numbers (num_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, binary_data BLOB);
INSERT INTO additional_numbers (num_id, binary_data) VALUES (1, TO_BASE64(0xABCDEF));
SELECT xenc_bn2dec(binary_data) FROM additional_numbers WHERE num_id = 1;
SELECT COUNT(*), xenc_bn2dec(serialized_number) FROM big_numbers GROUP BY serialized_number HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
SELECT xenc_bn2dec(serialized_number) FROM big_numbers WHERE serialized_number IN (SELECT binary_data FROM additional_numbers);
